lsp_notes: C/C++ LSP requires Ascend SDK headers (kernel_operator.h, tilingdata_base.h) which are not installed; Python LSP (pyright-langserver) not available

project_profile.deployment_model: Python library with C/C++ custom operators for Ascend NPU. Deployed as pip-installable packages in training environments. Users import modules and call APIs to train recommendation models.

trust_boundaries.untrusted_side: User-provided training data, model configurations, and API parameters
TOML config files, rank table JSON, model checkpoint files
User-provided tensors and parameters passed to operators
File paths provided by users or environment variables

modules.name: cust_op_ascendc
modules.description: Ascend C operators compiled for AI Core execution on NPU

modules.name: cust_op_framework_torch
modules.description: PyTorch operator adapters for custom NPU operators

modules.name: cust_op_framework_tf
modules.description: TensorFlow operator plugins for custom NPU operators

modules.name: cust_op_tf_cpu
modules.description: CPU operators for TensorFlow on Kunpeng processor

modules.name: training_common
modules.description: Common utilities including HCCL communication, validators, logging

modules.name: tf_rec_v2
modules.description: TensorFlow v2 recommendation training framework (full-sinking POC)

modules.name: torch_rec_v1
modules.description: PyTorch v1 recommendation training framework with TorchRec

modules.name: torch_rec_v2
modules.description: PyTorch v2 recommendation training framework with dynamic embedding

modules.name: lccl_socket_comm
modules.description: LCCL distributed training communication via TCP sockets

risk_reasons: Test file with custom_op_exec and golden_op_exec functions

entry_points.justification: TCP socket for distributed training within trusted cluster. Port from configuration, only accessible within training cluster network. Not exposed to public network.
entry_points.description: TCP socket server for inter-node communication in distributed training

entry_points.justification: Accept connections from other training nodes in the same cluster. Connection from nodes specified in rank table configuration.
entry_points.description: Accept incoming connections from training nodes

entry_points.justification: Receive data from other training nodes. Data comes from trusted training processes within same cluster.
entry_points.description: Receive training data from peer nodes

entry_points.justification: TOML config file path provided by user/admin at initialization. File is typically controlled by deployment scripts or system administrator.
entry_points.description: Load and parse TOML configuration file for training parameters

entry_points.justification: Rank table file path from RANK_TABLE_FILE environment variable, controlled by cluster deployment system. File content validated with class_safe_check.
entry_points.description: Load rank table JSON for distributed training configuration

entry_points.justification: Model index file path from save_dir parameter provided by user training script. File operations use secure file flags (SAVE_FILE_FLAG).
entry_points.description: Load and update model index JSON file for checkpoint management

entry_points.justification: File path from upper_dir parameter, controlled by training process. Reads slice data files generated by same training job.
entry_points.description: Read and merge slice data files for model checkpoint

entry_points.justification: Sparse attributes file path provided by user for model restoration. JSON.load on user-controlled checkpoint file.
entry_points.description: Load sparse model attributes from JSON file

entry_points.justification: PyTorch custom operator registered for NPU device. User can call operator via Python API with arbitrary tensors. Input validation in hstu_common.h checks bounds but tensor data is user-controlled.
entry_points.description: PyTorch custom operator for HSTU jagged tensor operations

entry_points.justification: Custom operator callable via Python API. User provides bucketize parameters and sparse feature indices.
entry_points.description: PyTorch custom operator for block bucketize sparse features

entry_points.justification: TensorFlow custom operator callable via TF API. User provides address and embedding parameters.
entry_points.description: TensorFlow custom operator for embedding lookup by address

entry_points.justification: Build script execution during package installation. Only runs during pip install, not runtime.
entry_points.description: Execute build scripts during package installation

attack_surfaces: Distributed Training Network: TCP socket communication for LCCL collective operations (training/common/src/core/lccl)
Configuration File Input: TOML config files parsed by mxrec (training/tf_rec_v2/mxrec/python/config)
Rank Table JSON: HCCL rank table file for distributed training setup (training/common/python/communication/hccl)
Model Checkpoint Files: JSON model index and sparse attributes files (training/tf_rec_v1/python/saver)
Custom Operator API: PyTorch TORCH_LIBRARY and TensorFlow REGISTER_OP custom operators (cust_op/framework)
Dynamic Embedding Load/Save: JSON and binary files for embedding tables (training/torch_rec_v2/dynamic_emb)
Build Scripts: subprocess calls in setup.py/setup_common.py (during installation only)
Ascend C Operators: AI Core operators with tensor input from user (cust_op/ascendc_op)
